llm_calls.prompt:
Task prompt:
Create the project "Alpha Launch" linked to the customer Beta Corp (org no. 123456789). The project manager is Ola Test (ola.test@example.org).

Base URL: http://localhost:9999/v2
Authentication: Basic Auth with username "0" and the session token.

Analyze this task and provide the JSON array of API calls needed to complete it.
Remember: be precise and minimal. Each unnecessary call or error hurts the score.
llm_calls.response:
I need to create a project "Alpha Launch" with customer "Beta Corp" and project manager "Ola Test". Let me plan the steps:

1. Create a department (required for employee)
2. Create the customer "Beta Corp"
3. Create employee "Ola Test" (needs department)
4. Create the project linking everything together

```json
[
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/department", "body": {"name": "General", "departmentNumber": 1}, "description": "Create department for employee"},
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/customer", "body": {"name": "Beta Corp", "email": "beta@betacorp.no", "isCustomer": true, "organizationNumber": "123456789"}, "description": "Create customer Beta Corp"},
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/employee", "body": {"firstName": "Ola", "lastName": "Test", "email": "ola.test@example.org", "userType": "STANDARD", "department": {"id": "{result_0_id}"}}, "description": "Create employee Ola Test", "depends_on": 0},
  {"method": "POST", "path": "/project", "body": {"name": "Alpha Launch", "projectManager": {"id": "{result_2_id}"}, "customer": {"id": "{result_1_id}"}, "isInternal": false, "startDate": "2025-01-01"}, "description": "Create project Alpha Launch", "depends_on": 2}
]
```
